title: New Automation Recipe to search text columns for a defined string
excerpt: We are creating items in a meeting log board from an incoming email. When the item is created, the email subject becomes the item’s name. We have an automation that defaults the date of item to today’s date. We would lik…

posts.author: PetraD (Petra)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are creating items in a meeting log board from an incoming email. When the item is created, the email subject becomes the item’s name. We have an automation that defaults the date of item to today’s date. We would like to set up an automation that searches in the item name (aka the email subject) for key text and then assigns a label to the item. Example: if the item name contains “internal” add a label “Internal Meeting”.

Please create an automation recipe that searches a text column like the item name for a a defined string (similar to ‘contains’ in a search).
